title: ferray-core: no unique/searchsorted/set operations
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides np.unique (with return_index, return_inverse, return_counts options), np.searchsorted, np.in1d, np.intersect1d, np.union1d, np.setdiff1d. These are in numpy._core and are essential for data processing pipelines. ferray has none of these. They depend on sorting (#366) and would provide the building blocks for categorical data handling, label encoding, and data deduplication.
